assertions.rationale: AddBffExtensions() is NOT called on AddReverseProxy() — BFF token management not registered

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'LoadFromMemory' with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig
assertions.rationale: LoadFromMemory with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig is present

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains '.WithAccessToken(TokenType.User)' on the RouteConfig (YARP uses TokenType, not RequiredTokenType)
assertions.rationale: No WithAccessToken on the RouteConfig — token attachment not configured

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'MapReverseProxy' with a pipeline that calls 'UseAntiforgeryCheck()'
assertions.rationale: MapReverseProxy() is called without a pipeline — no UseAntiforgeryCheck()
